_note: Batch 8: 8 real NCSY Summer Israel-based programs, researched 2026-07-10 directly from summer.ncsy.org, its per-program subdomains (kollel.ncsy.org, michlelet.ncsy.org, etc.), and summer.ncsy.org/compare-trips/ for gender/grade/duration. Scope was fixed in advance by the user: only Kollel, Kollel Mechina Track, Michlelet, Michlelet Mechina, GIVE, Israel ID, JOLT Israel, Next Step: Israel Internships, Hatzalah Rescue, Derech, and Euro Israel were in scope (US-based/Europe-only/below-9th-grade NCSY programs like Camp Sports, Impact, Chai Boys/Girls, GIVE West, Euro 4G, Camp Kesher, Camp Nageela Midwest, and JSU trips were explicitly excluded). Of the 11 in-scope names, 3 (Kollel, GIVE, Next Step: Israel Internships) were already PUBLISHED in the DB under NCSY -- this batch contains only the 8 that were not. Per explicit user data policy: no cost/tuition/application-fee/session-date data is included anywhere in this batch (cost is deliberately left "" on every row) -- link out to the official program page (signupUrl) instead of storing figures that change annually. No field was inferred or invented; anything not stated on the program's own official page was left "". Tags are drawn only from the tag set that existed in the DB before this batch (verified via a live query, not a static list) -- none of these 8 rows introduce a new tag. Affiliation-category tags were deliberately omitted for all 8 per explicit user instruction (not confident enough to guess Religious Zionism/Modern Orthodox vs. Flexible religously, especially for the two Mechina tracks which explicitly target public-school teens). Israeli-integration-category tags were also omitted for all 8 -- no official page stated enough about time spent with Israelis specifically to support a confident tier judgment.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Kollel Mechina Track
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A six-week program for public-school teens that combines Torah learning tailored to a range of skill levels with competitive sports leagues and touring across Israel, run alongside NCSY Kollel's campus.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Michlelet
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Reishit Yerushalayim campus, Beit Shemesh, with touring across Israel
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A program for teenage girls combining Torah study with accomplished educators, weekly chesed (volunteer) trips, and extensive touring across Israel -- including hiking, rafting, zip-lining, and water sports -- based at the Reishit Yerushalayim campus in Beit Shemesh.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Michlelet Mechina
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A six-week program for public-school teenage girls that blends Torah learning, chesed (charitable service) projects such as running carnivals for terror victims, and touring across Israel, alongside adventure activities like rappelling.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Israel ID
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Tel Aviv, Tzfat, Jerusalem, Eilat, Masada, and the Kinneret
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A touring program for teens combining major Israel sites -- including a dawn hike up Masada, rafting the Kinneret rapids, and a visit to Dialogue in the Dark -- with volunteer work alongside diverse Jewish communities and programming on Torah and connection to the land of Israel.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY JOLT Israel
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Golan, Kinneret, Haifa, Eilat, and the Judean Desert
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A leadership-development program for teens, centered on planning and running a ten-day camp for the siblings of children with chronic illnesses, combined with outdoor adventure activities -- including rappelling, cliff jumping, snorkeling, and waterskiing -- across Israel.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Hatzalah Rescue
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Kinneret, the Negev desert, and sites with Hatzalah's search and rescue unit
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A program for teens to train in CPR, hemorrhage control, and first-responder skills, becoming certified as Emergency Medical Responders, volunteering on ambulances, and assisting in a Hatzalah logistics and dispatch center, alongside water-rescue training on the Kinneret and rappelling with a search-and-rescue unit.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Derech
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Touring throughout Israel, north to south, with significant time at NCSY Kollel's campus
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: An all-boys touring program combining daily shiurim and chaburas for Torah learning with touring across Israel from north to south, spending significant time at NCSY Kollel's campus.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.

ncsy_summer_israel_programs.name: NCSY Euro Israel
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.location: Two weeks touring Israel after a European leg (London, Paris, Belgium, Amsterdam)
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.description: A trip combining a tour of Jewish heritage sites across Europe -- including London, Paris, Belgium, and Amsterdam -- with two weeks touring Israel's cities and sites, led by NCSY educators.
ncsy_summer_israel_programs.signupInstructions: Apply online through the NCSY Summer CampInTouch portal.
